programme.title: Magdaleno Orbos: Sa Kuko Ng Mga Lawin
Oo Na Mahal Na Kung Mahal
I'm Ellenya L
programme.desc: Ellenya's life revolves around social media just like a typical millennial; seeking validation from the online society. With aspirations of being a big influencer and vlogger, she chases her dreams by creating a persona and content with the help of her family and friends. Will Ellenya earn online fame or will she be an epic fail?

programme.title: You Got Me
programme.desc: After a big bust-up with his beloved girlfriend, a guy ends up in the arms of a seductive newcomer. Afterward, she develops an obsession with keeping the newly found romance alive.

programme.title: Feng Shui 2
programme.desc: It focuses on Lester who, upon getting the cursed bagua, starts to get all the luck and prosperity he could get in his life, but with deadly consequences.

programme.title: When Love Begins
programme.desc: Benedicto \"Ben\" Caballero is an environmentalist who disapproves of deforestation for villages in mountainous regions in the country.He is more concerned of the environment than that of getting along with his siblings.It is revealed that he was a former lawyer and that he quit because of a matter between right or wrong,and not about winning or losing.He focuses on nature-for him,it's all about saving the planet.

programme.title: Beauty In A Bottle
programme.desc: The lives of three women change when a new beauty product arrives.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: It's the story of a woman and her dog on a journey to Baguio to somewhat cure her ailing mother who was once saved by her dog. Somewhere along the journey, she will discover a different kind of love.

programme.title: Seoulmeyt
programme.desc: A Filipina K-drama fan meets the man of her dreams but things take a turn as she discovers the truth behind his 'pretend' personality.

programme.title: Marita
programme.desc: An actress commits suicide in a theatre full of people. Now she haunts the venue and those who visit.

programme.title: Shoot! Shoot! Di Ko Siya Titigilan
Meet Me In St. Gallen
programme.desc: The story of Jesse and Celeste who meets at an unexpected time in their lives. They then realize their names are the same as the characters in the popular break-up romantic comedy, Celeste and Jesse Forever.
